segments.text: Even accounting for that, if it lands it's a stock, so...
segments.original_text: っていうのも加味しても当たれば撃墜だからっていうので

segments.text: Since it's a bair, even whiffing it isn't that punishing
segments.original_text: 空後空なんで外してもそんな手痛い

full_text: Even accounting for that, if it lands it's a stock, so... Yeah Since it's a bair, even whiffing it isn't that punishing

corrections.original: 空担空なんで外してもそんな手痛い
corrections.corrected: 空後空なんで外してもそんな手痛い
corrections.rule: Move abbreviation: 空担空→空後空 (back air whiff)
